languages.text: {n}Покидая стрельбище, вы чувствуете, как вашу спину прожигают высокомерные взгляды.{/n}
{n}As you leave the shooting range, you feel arrogant stares burning into your back.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Покидая стрельбище, вы чувствуете, как вашу спину прожигают высокомерные взгляды.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}As you leave the shooting range, you feel arrogant stares burning into your back.{/n}
{n}As you leave the shooting range, you feel arrogant stares burning into your back.{/n}
{n}As you leave the training ground, you feel arrogant stares burning into your back. Their meaning is unmistakable: you may be a Rogue Trader, but the Merovians do not consider you their equal.{/n}
{n}As you leave the shooting range, you feel arrogant stares burning into your back.{/n}
{n}As you leave the shooting range, you feel arrogant stares burning into your back.{/n}

languages.text: {n}訓練場を出ていくと、背中に冷たい視線が焼き付いているのがわかる。彼らの視線は明白に、お前はローグトレーダーだとしても、メロヴィアンとは同格ではない、と告げている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you leave the training ground, you feel arrogant stares burning into your back. Their meaning is unmistakable: you may be a Rogue Trader, but the Merovians do not consider you their equal.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Poligondan ayrılırken kibirli bakışların sırtını hedef aldığını hissediyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you leave the shooting range, you feel arrogant stares burning into your back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Poligondan ayrılırken kibirli bakışların sırtını hedef aldığını hissediyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}当你离开射击场时，你感到一道道傲慢的目光灼烧着你的后背。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you leave the shooting range, you feel arrogant stares burning into your back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}当你离开射击场时，你感到一道道傲慢的目光灼烧着你的后背。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Beim Verlassen des Schießstandes spürst du die arroganten Blicke der Soldaten in deinem Rücken.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you leave the shooting range, you feel arrogant stares burning into your back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Beim Verlassen des Schießstandes spürst du die arroganten Blicke der Soldaten in deinem Rücken.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Lorsque vous quittez le stand de tir, vous sentez peser sur vous le poids de regards arrogants.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As you leave the shooting range, you feel arrogant stares burning into your back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Lorsque vous quittez le stand de tir, vous sentez peser sur vous le poids de regards arrogants.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cuando te alejas del campo de tiro, sientes miradas arrogantes clavarse en tu espalda.{/n}
